text: You find a suspicious object on the deck. Which initial action will you take to safeguard life?

options.text: Carry it manually to the captain's office deck
Move all personnel as far away from the object as possible
Submerge it in the main galley sink water tank immediately
Hit it with a wrench to check for metallic hollow signatures

explanation: In the event of a suspicious object, the primary goal is the safety of the crew. Evacuation and cordoning off the area are the mandatory initial responses, followed by professional intervention; the object should never be touched or moved.
